name: Factual Correction
about: Report an inaccurate claim, misattribution, or incorrect statistic

## Claim as stated in the paper

> Paste the relevant text here.

## Section / File

Which file and section contains this claim?

## What is incorrect?

Describe the error — misattributed quote, wrong number, mischaracterized source, etc.

## Correct information

What should it say instead?

## Source

Link to or cite the source that supports the correction.
